Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class InvestmentVehicleExperience

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.InvestmentVehicleExperience
public class InvestmentVehicleExperience extends Object
InvestmentVehicleExperience - This captures a user's experience with investment vehicles. It includes details such as the user's average annual trade count for various investment vehicles
